description: Interface Flutter multiplataforma do ecossistema SIS para chamados GLPI

sourceBoundary.hostPaths: C:\Users\... and /mnt/c/... are host/tooling/history references, not source roots
sourceBoundary.hybridRuntime: WSL for source development/analyze/test; Windows host for Android SDK, emulator, adb, flutter run -d android, and Android release builds
sourceBoundary.wslAndroidPolicy: PowerShell, Android SDK, and ANDROID_HOME are not required inside WSL; absence there is not a project failure
sourceBoundary.windowsBuildMirror: C:\Users\jonathan-moletta\build-mirrors\sis-mobile-flutter is an operational build mirror only; it is not a source root
runtimeDependencies: PowerShell for Windows-host project scripts when available

hints.externalAccessStrategy: Para distribuicao somente APK: Cloudflare Worker em workers.dev + Workers VPC + Tunnel; VPN fica para acesso direto interno, desenvolvimento ou grupos controlados; sem bridge USB/LAN, adb reverse ou proxy de notebook
hints.glpiMutationSafety: Preserve production app functions, but agents must default to read-only validation against real GLPI and must not use SIS pass-through Worker for DELETE /Ticket, purge, or automated cleanup without explicit human approval and isolated synthetic target.

validation.visualWsl: cd widgetbook && /opt/flutter/bin/flutter pub get && /opt/flutter/bin/flutter analyze && /opt/flutter/bin/flutter test && /opt/flutter/bin/flutter build web
